name: Program Executions in Suspicious Folders
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Program Executions in Suspicious Folders
SIGMA Description: Detects program executions in suspicious non-program folders related to malware or hacking activity

False positives:
- Admin activity (especially in /tmp folders)
- Crazy web applications

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/tmp/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/www/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/home/%/public_html/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/usr/local/apache2/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/usr/local/httpd/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/apache/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/srv/www/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/home/httpd/html/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/srv/http/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/usr/share/nginx/html/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/lib/pgsql/data/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/usr/local/mysql/data/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/lib/mysql/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/vsftpd/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/bind/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/named/%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Program Executions in Suspicious Folders on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/tmp/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/www/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/home/%/public_html/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/usr/local/apache2/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/usr/local/httpd/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/apache/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/srv/www/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/home/httpd/html/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/srv/http/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/usr/share/nginx/html/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/lib/pgsql/data/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/usr/local/mysql/data/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/lib/mysql/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/vsftpd/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/bind/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/named/%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Program Executions in Suspicious Folders
